compositional_truth_check.p1_yellow_pot: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter; soil appears barren.
compositional_truth_check.p2_p4_black_pot_lower: Active: Single stem/leaf structure present with eggshell debris.
compositional_truth_check.p3_black_pot_upper: Active: Pothos leaf present with rabbit anchor.
new_introductions: Electronic component (IC/chip) appearing in T-5 through T-1, replaced by a USB-C cable in CURRENT.

plant_audit.p1: Empty yellow pot. No signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.p2_p4: Single, chlorotic, elongated stem. High risk of failure.
plant_audit.p3: Single Pothos leaf remains healthy; rabbit anchor is stable.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments present in P2/P4; electronic waste (IC chip) removed and replaced by USB-C cable.

temporal_deltas.T_minus_5_to_T_minus_1: Electronic component (IC chip) remained static on the desk surface. Plant structures showed no significant growth or decline.
temporal_deltas.Current: Electronic component removed; USB-C cable introduced to the workspace.

anomalies: Presence of non-botanical items (IC chip, USB-C cable) suggests the desk is being used as a staging area for electronics, potentially impacting plant care focus.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical collection is in a state of severe neglect. P1 is entirely lost. P2/P4 is reduced to a single, struggling stem that lacks the vigor expected of a healthy specimen. P3 remains the only stable element, though it is isolated. The desk environment is cluttered with non-botanical debris, indicating a lack of dedicated horticultural maintenance.
